instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect missing CAN messages.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect communication fault when expected CAN message is not received within timeout.

L4_requirements: IF CAN_Message_Timer > Message_Timeout_Limit THEN CAN_Message_Missing_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect corrupted CAN messages.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when CAN message checksum validation fails.

L4_requirements: IF CAN_Checksum_Status = Invalid THEN CAN_Message_Corruption_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall use fallback values when CAN data is missing.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall apply default parameter when CAN message timeout occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable dependent functions when CAN fault occurs.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable adaptive shift feature when engine torque message is missing.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect delayed CAN messages.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when message arrival delay exceeds configured limit.

L4_requirements: IF CAN_Message_Delay > Delay_Limit THEN CAN_Message_Delay_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect invalid CAN signal values.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when received CAN signal value is outside valid range.

L4_requirements: IF CAN_Signal_Value OUTSIDE Valid_Range THEN CAN_Data_Invalid_Fault = TRUE
IF CAN_Signal_Value WITHIN Valid_Range THEN Maintain_Normal_Operation

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enter safe mode when CAN communication fails.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate limp mode when multiple CAN communication faults occur.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall isolate CAN communication faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall identify faulty node when communication errors occur.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe gear during CAN faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain predefined gear when CAN_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear CAN faults after communication recovery.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear CAN fault when valid CAN messages are received again.
